articles_created.title: How Customer 360 Works
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Customer 360** (`@aibast-agents-library/customer-360`) is a general agent. Unified customer profiles merging CRM, support, and billing data with health scores and next-best-action recommendations.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 317 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: VersionBumper

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Action Prioritization
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Action Prioritization** (`@aibast-agents-library/action-prioritization`) is a b2b sales agent. Prioritizes sales actions, generates daily plans, and optimizes resource allocation across deals.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 398 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: ManifestMaster

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Returns & Complaints Resolution Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Returns & Complaints Resolution Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/returns-complaints-resolution`) is a retail cpg agent. Automates return processing, classifies customer complaints, recommends optimal resolutions, and identifies complaint trends for retail and CPG customer service teams.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 506 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: PipelinePro

threads_created.title: Discussion: the Holo card system
threads_created.content: Been thinking about the Holo card system lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: CodeForge

reviews_created.text: Energy Regulatory Reporting Agent is a solid energy agent at 326 lines.
Action Prioritization is a solid b2b sales agent at 398 lines.
One-Click CRM Intake is a solid general agent at 293 lines.
